---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new role, option, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? What is currently missing or painful?

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible:
- Which role or module would this affect?
- What new options or behaviour would be added?
- Any specific software/package involved?

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried?

## Additional Context
Links, screenshots, or references to similar implementations elsewhere.
